GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup PAGEREF _Toc183096012 \h 1 1.1 Enablement System Code PAGEREF _Toc183096013 \h 1 2. ADD C-000-EX19 CODE ID TO C-000 GLOBAL CODE PAGEREF _Toc183096014 \h 4 1.2 C-000-EX19 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc183096015 \h 5 3. ADD EX19 CONTROLS SYSTEM CODE PAGEREF _Toc183096016 \h 6 1.2.1 C-E19 - PARAMETERS PAGEREF _Toc183096017 \h 6 1.2.2 C-E19 – CODE ID’S PAGEREF _Toc183096018 \h 9 1.2.3 Add base code b-784-19 misc instruction code 5 PAGEREF _Toc183096019 \h 9 1.2.4 Add SYSTEM code S-590 eX19 enablement PAGEREF _Toc183096020 \h 10 1.2.5 Enable misc instruction code 5 on saved wave template PAGEREF _Toc183096021 \h 12 1 . GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C- 000 ( Global Extens ion Control ) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the followin g information: 232410 174433 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. 2343785 9036050 Page 3 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 3 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 right 353276 0 0 Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. 2343785 9036050 Page 4 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 4 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 Click on the Parameters tab 189290 417782 check the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. 2343785 9036050 Page 5 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 5 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 2. ADD C-0 0 0-EX 19 CODE ID TO C- 000 G LO BAL CODE 138023 631981 Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000 - EX06 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. 2343785 9036050 Page 6 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 6 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 C- 000 - EX 19 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. 2343785 9036050 Page 5 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 5 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 2343785 9036050 Page 7 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 7 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 3. ADD EX 19 CONTROLS SYSTEM CODE Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- E 19 if it has not been added. Click the Add button. Use the information provided in the screenshot above to fill the available fields and add C- EX 19 custom code. 2343785 9036050 Page 8 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 8 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 Click SAVE. C-E 19 - PARAMETERS Click the Checkbox to select custom code C- E19 in the System Codes menu. Click on the Parameters action button. This will bring you to Parameters tab. Click Add button. For your first parameter, c omplete the fields with the information provided in the screenshot and select the indicated checkboxes and drop-down menu selections. The values in these bytes are determined by MCLN operational needs. Click Save Click the Add button to add next parameter. Click the Add button to add next parameter. Click SAVE button. Click the Add button to add next parameter. Click SAVE button. Click the Add button to add next parameter. Click SAVE button. Click the Add button to add next parameter. Click SAVE button. C-E 19 – CODE ID’S After C-E 1 9 has been added, click the checkbox to select the C-EX 19 Code. Click on the Code ID's action button. This will bring you to the details tab. On the details tab, click the ADD button. Select Parameters tab – these values are determined by operational needs Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Add base code b-784-19 misc instruction code 5 Navigate to System Codes UI, filter for System Code Type 784 Select Code IDs, select Add – Populate with below values Save Add SYSTEM code S -590 eX19 enablement Navigate to System Codes UI, filter for System Code Type 590 Select Parameters, select Add – Populate with below values Save Select Parameters , select Add – Populate with below values Save Select Parameters, select Add – Populate with below values Save Select Code IDs , open parameters tab for each Code ID and turn on byte 100-100 for each task type that will utilize EX19 logic during chase wave picking task prioritization . Turn on byte 19-19 for each task type that will utilize EX19 batch across shipments logic . Populate byte 20-29 for task types that will utilize EX19 grouping attribute logic. Save Enable misc instruction code 5 on saved wave template Navigate to Run Wave UI – Select Wave Applicable for EX19 , select Run Wave On Parameters Tab, Special Instructions section, select the drop down menu for Instruction 5, s elect EX19 Enabled 2343785 9036050 Page 13 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 13 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 Save Configuration
